description: Legacy L0 content migration to V5 contract (core/i18n split, atom mapping, gold standards, pipeline and frontend verification)

tasks.desc: Inventory and freeze L0 lesson list and source baseline (ids, paths, current v4 format references).
Restructure L0 content into V5-aligned core/i18n split and normalize directory layout.
Run tokenization + atom segmentation for all L0 lesson sentences and generate candidate mapping artifacts.
Map L0 tokens to V5 dictionary atoms and resolve unresolved/high-frequency conflicts to target threshold.
Generate and lock gold standards for L0 dialogue (`gold_standards/dialogue/A0/*.jsonl`) for regression checks.
Integrate L0 into content-pipeline V5 build path and ensure mapping/integrity gates pass for scoped runs.
Validate frontend intake compatibility (parser/asset schema) and run a smoke pass on representative L0 lessons.
Closeout: publish migration report (coverage, unresolved deltas, rollback notes), update TASK_INDEX, and prepare release-ready bundle.
